rubric_100.deterministic_compliance_25: JSON validity, required fields, source-ID hygiene, route/verdict consistency where applicable.
rubric_100.epistemic_grounding_25: Whether the artifact correctly identifies what the packet evidence actually proves or fails to prove.
rubric_100.structural_completeness_25: Whether the artifact cleanly binds action, source records, policy rule, blocker/closure status, and final verdict.
rubric_100.argument_source_binding_25: Whether the argument uses the controlling source chain rather than caution, vibes, or invented requirements.

artifact_scores.label: WRONG
artifact_scores.rationale: Solo produced valid JSON and cited real packet documents, but it invented a separate closure-record requirement after acknowledging that DISP-OVX-021 grants the matching thermal-transport disposition authority. The error is exactly the overblocking seam.

artifact_scores.label: KNEW
artifact_scores.rationale: HoloVerify-V correctly bound ALERT-OVX-HOLD-021 to DISP-OVX-021 and identified exact match on product, lot, thermal-transport hold class, and release path. It did not invent a magic separate release document.

artifact_scores.label: LUCKY
artifact_scores.rationale: Solo reached the correct ESCALATE verdict and identified the hold-class mismatch, but it cited INV-OVX-2026-7021 as if it were a source doc ID. Because strict source hygiene matters in HoloVerify, this is not a clean KNEW.

artifact_scores.label: KNEW
artifact_scores.rationale: HoloVerify-V cleanly escalated because DISP-OVX-021 covered packaging-inspection while the release/alert required thermal-transport. The paired guardrail was preserved.

artifact_scores.label: WRONG
artifact_scores.rationale: Solo acknowledged that CAL-ACR-022 covers DG-41B production units but still treated the shared-prefix warning as ambiguity. It also failed the local site-binding check for the ALLOW case. This is the core false-escalation seam.

artifact_scores.label: KNEW
artifact_scores.rationale: HoloVerify-V correctly recognized that CAL-ACR-022 explicitly covers production telemetry units at Site 18-P for RC-7 before activation. It treated NOTE-ACR-022 as a warning against prefix-only reasoning, not as a blocker.

artifact_scores.label: KNEW
artifact_scores.rationale: Solo cleanly identified that CAL-ACR-022 covers lab telemetry units at Site 18-L while activation targets production units at Site 18-P. This is a correct source-boundary escalation.

artifact_scores.label: KNEW
artifact_scores.rationale: HoloVerify-V correctly escalated on the lab-vs-production and Site 18-L vs Site 18-P mismatch while preserving the shared-prefix rule. Slight structural penalty because the binding summarized device group as DG-41B on both sides while relying primarily on site and lab/production context.

prelim_summary: Prelim local judgment strongly favors HoloVerify-V. Holo went 4/4 clean with average score 97.5. Solo went 2/4 on target verdicts, only 1/4 clean target matches, and average score 69.75. This is not official benchmark adjudication; it is a local preliminary read to decide whether the pair set is worth expanding before official judging.
